name: rembrandt
description: Dutch Golden Age oil painting with chiaroscuro lighting.
style_suffix: in the style of a Rembrandt oil painting, dark chiaroscuro lighting with a single warm light source from the upper left, figures emerging from deep shadow, rich earth-tone palette of burnt umber, ochre, and crimson, thick impasto brushwork, aged cracked varnish texture, seventeenth-century Dutch sensibility, painted on linen canvas
